# ltm — full content index for LLMs

This file concatenates the full README and specification. Regenerated on each deploy by `.github/workflows/pages.yml` from `README.md` + `SPEC.md` in the repo root — those files are the source of truth.

Canonical sources:
- Spec: https://github.com/dennisdevulder/ltm/blob/main/SPEC.md
- README: https://github.com/dennisdevulder/ltm/blob/main/README.md

===

(File will be populated by the Pages deploy workflow. See README.md and SPEC.md in the repository for current content.)
